title: Privacy | #shorts
full_text: Mom, what are you doing? >> What are you doing here? I left you guys all at home. Why you ruining my vibe? >> No one's heard from you since the morning. We were worried about you. >> I'm working. Bye. >> This is you working. >> Oh, you're going to tell me now what my work is? You're going to tell me how old are you? 12-year-old. Be quiet.
